title: solanum nodiflorum var. besseri
intro: Solanum nodiflorum var. besseri, also known as Bess's nightshade, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family, closely related to the common nightshade. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of solanine and other glycoalkaloids. The health benefits of Solanum nodiflorum var. besseri include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas and infusions, as well as being used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to exercise caution when using this plant due to its toxicity.
